meaning: adv.无穷尽地,可靠地,不倦地
examples: He was unfailingly polite to customers.
His relations with colleagues, differences of opinion notwithstanding, were unfailingly friendly.
The recession has certainly come with more problems than Andrea anticipated, but she remains unfailingly optimistic.
This place remains an unfailingly good address for a trencherman's feed of impeccably prepared bistro classics.
The unfailingly consistent excellence of the Irish Rep is no less easy to take for granted.
